title: cyperus metallorum
intro: Cyperus metallorum is a type of plant in the sedge family, characterized by its unique ability to thrive in environments with high levels of heavy metals. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to remove heavy metals from the body, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as mercury poisoning. The health benefits of Cyperus metallorum include its potential to detoxify the body, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
